The [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] '''''Century Hawk''''' was the personal ship of [[Danielle Kieran]]. She bought the ship by taking a loan from [[Talon Karrde]], wanting to fly the same ship as her supposed father [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Kieran was determined to tinker the ship into some kind of reasonable shape; "reasonable" meaning as close to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] as was possible. As of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] she was flying the ship out of [[Crystal Web Station]], hoping to prove herself to Solo.
